attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.LIST_LINE_ID, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.CREATION_DATE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.CREATED_BY, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.LAST_UPDATED_BY, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.MODIFIER_LEVEL_CODE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.PRICE_BY_FORMULA_ID, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.LIST_PRICE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.LIST_PRICE_UOM_CODE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.OVERRIDE_FLAG, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.PRINT_ON_INVOICE_FLAG, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.REBATE_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CODE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.BASE_QTY, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.GENERATE_USING_FORMULA_ID, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.REPRICE_FLAG, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.LIST_LINE_NO, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.ESTIM_GL_VALUE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.BENEFIT_PRICE_LIST_LINE_ID, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.EXPIRATION_PERIOD_START_DATE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.NUMBER_EXPIRATION_PERIODS, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.EXPIRATION_PERIOD_UOM, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.EXPIRATION_DATE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.ACCRUAL_FLAG, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.PRICING_PHASE_ID, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.PRICING_GROUP_SEQUENCE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.INCOMPATIBILITY_GRP_CODE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.PRODUCT_PRECEDENCE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.PRORATION_TYPE_CODE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.ACCRUAL_CONVERSION_RATE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.BENEFIT_QTY, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.BENEFIT_UOM_CODE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.RECURRING_FLAG, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.BENEFIT_LIMIT, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.CHARGE_TYPE_CODE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.CHARGE_SUBTYPE_CODE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.CONTEXT, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.ATTRIBUTE1, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.ATTRIBUTE2, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.ATTRIBUTE3, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.ATTRIBUTE4, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.ATTRIBUTE5, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.ATTRIBUTE6, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.ATTRIBUTE7, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.ATTRIBUTE8, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.ATTRIBUTE9, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.ATTRIBUTE10, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.ATTRIBUTE11, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.ATTRIBUTE12, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.ATTRIBUTE13, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.ATTRIBUTE14, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.ATTRIBUTE15, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.INCLUDE_ON_RETURNS_FLAG, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.QUALIFICATION_IND, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.LIMIT_EXISTS_FLAG, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.GROUP_COUNT, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.NET_AMOUNT_FLAG, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.RECURRING_VALUE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.ACCUM_CONTEXT, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.ACCUM_ATTRIBUTE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.ACCUM_ATTR_RUN_SRC_FLAG, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.CUSTOMER_ITEM_ID, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.BREAK_UOM_CODE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.BREAK_UOM_CONTEXT, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.BREAK_UOM_ATTRIBUTE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.PATTERN_ID, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.PRODUCT_UOM_CODE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.PRICING_ATTRIBUTE_COUNT, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.HASH_KEY, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.CACHE_KEY, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.ORIG_SYS_LINE_REF, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.ORIG_SYS_HEADER_REF, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.CONTINUOUS_PRICE_BREAK_FLAG, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.EQ_FLAG, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.CURRENCY_HEADER_ID, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.NULL_OTHER_OPRT_COUNT, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.PTE_CODE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.TRAIL_FILE_NAME, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.SOURCE_DML_TYPE, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.REFRESH_DATETIME, STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.PROCESSED_FLAG 
FROM
 $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES,
 (
 select LIST_LINE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$ACCUMSTGDB.STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES
 minus
 select LIST_LINE_ID ,REFRESH_DATETIME from $$NRTACCUMDB.CG1_QP_LIST_LINES
 ) ACM
 where 
 ACM.LIST_LINE_ID = STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.LIST_LINE_ID and ACM.REFRESH_DATETIME=STG_CG1_QP_LIST_LINES.REFRESH_DATETIME

attributes.Source Filter:
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME >= TO_TIMESTAMP('$$LastExtractDate','MM/DD/YYYY HH24:MI:SS:FF') - INTERVAL '$$OVERLAP_SECONDS' SECOND AND
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME <= (SELECT MAX(SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME) FROM $$SRCDB.CG1_QP_LIST_LINES)
